footer.tagline: Daily movement practice · Mobility step by step

home.hero_lead: A thoughtful mobile app that combines daily movement practice with an approach inspired by yoga and physical therapy. Video practices from catalogs built with specialists, a plan tailored to you, and challenges that build real flexibility - step by step.
home.cta_app_store: Coming soon to the App Store
home.phone_aria: Phone showing the ARNGCOR app screen

features.label: Features
features.desc: You don't have to build the plan yourself. ARNGCOR assembles your daily practice from extensive exercise catalogs - created with physical therapists, personal trainers, and yoga teachers - and adapts it to your goal, level, and habits.

cards.title: Daily video practice
cards.body: A different, carefully built video practice every day - matched to your goal, age, activity, and flexibility level. Exercises from professionally prepared catalogs, without generative AI.

cards.title: Progress tracking
cards.body: Day streaks, minutes of work, and completed exercises in one place. You see real progress, not just the feeling that you worked out today.

cards.title: Pain Relief
cards.body: Short relief sequences for your neck, shoulders, and lower back when hours at a desk leave you stiff and tense.

cards.title: Challenge programs
cards.body: Step-by-step plans with a fixed base, strengthening exercises, and a checkpoint that opens the next level.

cards.title: Profile and personalization
cards.body: A short onboarding sets your goal, flexibility level (1-4), and training plan - without complicated settings.

cards.title: Privacy first
cards.body: No behavioral ads or third-party tracking analytics. Your data is yours. Privacy Policy

how.label: How it works
how.title_html:
From first launch
to a daily habit
how.desc: Four simple steps - ARNGCOR handles the rest.

steps.title: Choose your goal
steps.body: Strength and mobility, ease discomfort, new skills, or a bit of everything.

steps.title: Flexibility test
steps.body: A short test sets your level so the app knows where to start.

steps.title: Daily practice
steps.body: The app builds your practice from exercise catalogs. Video exercises have clear goals: hold the position, move smoothly.

steps.title: Progress and challenges
steps.body: Open the next stages, including Wheel and Front Split programs.

challenges.label: Challenges
challenges.title: Wheel and Front Split
challenges.desc: Ambitious goals broken into thoughtful, achievable steps - with progress badges and a checkpoint before each new stage.
challenges.wheel_body: A gradual plan from basics to a full wheel. Each stage builds strength and mobility before you open the next, and you can track progress in your profile.
challenges.split_body: A structured stretching program for front and side splits. Strengthening exercises, a fixed base, and measurable progress in the app.

audience.label: Who it's for
audience.title: Built for real life
audience.desc: You don't need to be an athlete or have years of yoga behind you - just a willingness to move and a few minutes a day.

cards.title: Desk work
cards.body: Stiffness and pain in your back and hips after long hours at a desk.

cards.title: Active athletes
cards.body: Better mobility, recovery, and injury prevention.

cards.title: Beginners
cards.body: Yoga and stretching without the pressure of a crowded studio - at home, at your own pace.

cards.title: A small, steady habit
cards.body: One short practice a day instead of multi-hour plans that are hard to stick with.

privacy_card.title: Your privacy matters
privacy_card.body_html: ARNGCOR does not sell your data or use behavioral ads. We process data under GDPR - details in our privacy policy and terms of service. The app does not replace medical advice.

cta_banner.title: Start with one practice a day
cta_banner.body: Movement becomes a habit when it's simple, short, and tailored to you. ARNGCOR was built for exactly that - to give you something concrete every day.
cta_banner.button: Coming soon to the App Store

about.hero_lead: My name is Konrad. ARNGCOR is my project - refined in every detail, with content developed together with movement and health specialists.

blocks.title: Konrad · SovinSky Studio
paragraphs: My name is Konrad, and I stand behind ARNGCOR and SovinSky Studio - my personal brand and independent project that I build from idea to finished app. This is not a large corporation with dozens of people on the team. It's me, my vision, and a product I work on with full commitment - because I believe daily movement practice can look different: simpler, smarter, and without building a plan from scratch.

The exercise catalogs were created with physical therapists, personal trainers, and yoga teachers. I assembled ARNGCOR from them - practice matching, the app, and the full user experience. The result is a tool that combines solid expertise with a thoughtful, polished digital product.

blocks.title: The ARNGCOR app
paragraphs: A mobile app for iOS (Android in development) with video training, challenge programs (Wheel, Front Split), Pain Relief sequences, and an optional Premium subscription in the Apple App Store.
Your daily practice is built from extensive exercise catalogs created with physical therapists, personal trainers, and yoga teachers. The app adapts it to your goal, flexibility level, and activity.
The app does not replace medical advice. Before exercising, if you have health concerns, talk to a specialist.

about.contact_legal_html: Legal documents: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service.
